channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner officially withdraws from race
item.description: Graham Platner formally ended his campaign for the Maine Senate on Friday.

item.title: Police investigate murder of former British politician found dead at home
item.description: Ann Widdecombe, a former MP, was found dead in her southwest England home with serious injuries, police reported.

item.title: Iran live updates: US officials say negotiations with Iran to resume
item.description: President Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: China touts first reusable rocket booster
item.description: China claims it has successfully recovered a reusable rocket booster, a significant space technology milestone.
